user.title: Import statistics
user.description: Transfers long-term and short-term statistics from one entity to another. By default statistics are moved (removed from the source entity); uncheck to copy instead. If the target already has statistics, choose whether to merge (the target's existing rows win on timestamp collisions) or replace them entirely.

data.on_conflict: If the target already has statistics

error.same_entity: Source and target must be different entities.
error.no_statistics: No statistics found for the source entity.
error.migration_failed: Migration failed — check the Home Assistant logs.

abort.moved: Statistics moved from {source} to {target}: {long_term} long-term rows, {short_term} short-term rows. Restart Home Assistant to refresh the recorder caches.
abort.copied: Statistics copied from {source} to {target}: {long_term} long-term rows, {short_term} short-term rows. Restart Home Assistant to refresh the recorder caches.
abort.moved_replaced: Statistics moved from {source} to {target}: {long_term} long-term rows, {short_term} short-term rows. {replaced} existing rows on the target were deleted first. Restart Home Assistant to refresh the recorder caches.
abort.copied_replaced: Statistics copied from {source} to {target}: {long_term} long-term rows, {short_term} short-term rows. {replaced} existing rows on the target were deleted first. Restart Home Assistant to refresh the recorder caches.

options.merge: Merge (keep the target's rows on collisions)
